# Version 3.118.0
> **Rolled up into 3.119.0** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.118.0-preview)

> **Superseded by [3.119.0](3.119.0.md)** · Never released as stable — these changes rolled up into 3.119.0.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.118.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1/index.md)

## Highlights

Preview 3.118.0 collected milestone 117 and 118 bumps and the Blazor/WASM fixes that shipped as 3.119.0.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia milestone 117 and 118** — Bumps the bundled Skia to milestone 118, catching up two upstream releases. ([#3048](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3048), [#3047](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3047))

## API Surface

- **Metal render targets everywhere** — The GRBackendRenderTarget Metal APIs are now available on every Apple platform. — ❤️ [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070))

## Bug Fixes

- **Blazor and WASM plumbing** — Fixes .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor issues, sets the WinUI SDK version explicitly, and moves the earlier Blazor workaround into WASM. ([#3064](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3064), [#3085](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3085), [#3082](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3082), [#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088), [#3092](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3092))

## Security

- **Native dependency refresh** — Updates freetype2, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo and HarfBuzz in the bundled Skia. ([#3061](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3061), [#3056](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3056), [#3060](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3060), [#3052](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3052))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1

Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.1 and picks up the WASM/Blazor plumbing fixes and the Android NDK r27c / 16 KB alignment update in the HarfBuzzSharp binding. ([#3101](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3101), [#3099](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3099), [#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088), [#3082](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3082))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) | Made the GRBackendRenderTarget Metal APIs available on every Apple platform. ([#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070)) |

## Preview 2 (December 5, 2024)

Preview 2 added the Metal render-target APIs everywhere, the Blazor/WASM plumbing fixes, and refreshed freetype, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo and HarfBuzz.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.1.2...v3.118.0-preview.2.3)

## Preview 1 (November 6, 2024)

Preview 1 opened the 3.118.0 line with the milestone 117 and 118 bumps.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.116.1...v3.118.0-preview.1.2)
